title: salix × lambertiana
intro: Salix × lambertiana, also known as Lambert's willow, is a hybrid willow plant that is a cross between Salix purpurea and Salix alba. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve pain. The leaves and bark of Salix × lambertiana contain salicylic acid, a compound similar to aspirin, which provides its health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving headaches, and improving cardiovascular health. Salix × lambertiana can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve for various herbal remedies.
